ais.name: ChatGPT
ais.when_to_use: Jab bhi koi bhi kaam ho — writing, coding, explain karna
ais.pros: Fast, accurate, versatile
ais.desc: Duniya ka sabse popular AI chatbot. GPT-4o model use karta hai.

ais.name: Claude
ais.when_to_use: Jab lambi files padhni ho ya detailed response chahiye
ais.pros: Safe, long context, very smart
ais.desc: Anthropic ka AI — bahut safe aur samajhdar. 200k token context support.

ais.name: Gemini
ais.when_to_use: Jab Google Docs/Drive ke saath kaam karna ho
ais.pros: Google apps integration, free plan achha hai
ais.desc: Google ka AI assistant. Gmail, Docs, Drive ke saath directly kaam karta hai.

ais.name: Microsoft Copilot
ais.when_to_use: Jab Word, Excel, PowerPoint mein AI chahiye
ais.pros: Free, Windows built-in, Office integration
ais.desc: Microsoft ka AI — Windows aur Office ke andar built-in. Bilkul free.

ais.name: Perplexity AI
ais.best_for: Real-time web search with AI answers
ais.when_to_use: Jab latest news ya research chahiye sources ke saath
ais.pros: Real-time data, sources deta hai
ais.desc: AI + Search engine combo. Har answer ke saath verified sources deta hai.

ais.name: Grok
ais.when_to_use: Jab Twitter trends ya bold answers chahiye
ais.pros: Real-time X data, funny aur honest responses
ais.cons: X account chahiye use karne ke liye
ais.desc: Elon Musk ka AI — X platform se real-time data access karta hai.

ais.name: Meta AI
ais.when_to_use: Jab WhatsApp ya Instagram mein directly AI chahiye
ais.pros: Free, WhatsApp mein built-in, open source
ais.desc: Meta ka free AI. WhatsApp aur Instagram mein directly use hota hai.

ais.name: Midjourney
ais.when_to_use: Jab professional level art ya illustrations chahiye
ais.pros: Best quality images, very realistic aur artistic
ais.cons: Paid only, Discord se use karna padta hai
ais.desc: Sabse popular image AI. Discord se use hota hai. Basic plan $10/month.

ais.name: DALL-E 3
ais.best_for: Accurate text in images, concept art
ais.when_to_use: Jab image mein text accurately likhna ho
ais.pros: Text in images accurate, ChatGPT se directly use hota hai
ais.desc: OpenAI ka image generator. ChatGPT Plus ke saath free milta hai.

ais.name: Stable Diffusion
ais.when_to_use: Jab apne PC pe offline unlimited images banana ho bina kisi cost ke
ais.pros: Free, offline, unlimited images, customizable
ais.cons: Technical setup chahiye, powerful PC chahiye
ais.desc: Bilkul free aur open source. Apne PC pe install karke unlimited images bana sakte ho.

ais.name: Adobe Firefly
ais.when_to_use: Jab legally safe commercial images chahiye business ke liye
ais.pros: Commercially safe, Photoshop mein directly
ais.cons: Limited free credits, Adobe account chahiye
ais.desc: Adobe ka AI — commercially safe images banata hai. Photoshop ke andar built-in.

ais.name: Leonardo AI
ais.best_for: Game assets, character design, unlimited generation
ais.when_to_use: Jab game characters ya unlimited images chahiye free mein
ais.pros: Free mein bahut zyada images, game assets best
ais.desc: Game developers ka favorite. Free plan mein 150 images/day milti hain.

ais.name: Suno AI
ais.best_for: Full songs with lyrics and music
ais.when_to_use: Jab poora gana banana ho — lyrics + music + vocals sab
ais.pros: Full songs banata hai, bahut realistic sound
ais.desc: Sirf text likho — poora gana ban jaata hai vocals ke saath. Free mein 50 songs/day.

ais.name: Udio
ais.when_to_use: Jab professional quality music chahiye
ais.pros: Very high quality audio output
ais.desc: Professional quality music generator. Suno ka strong competitor hai.

ais.name: ElevenLabs
ais.when_to_use: Jab kisi ki awaaz clone karni ho ya text ko voice mein convert karna ho
ais.pros: Best voice quality, realistic cloning
ais.desc: Duniya ka best voice AI. Kisi bhi awaaz clone kar sakta hai realistic tarike se.

ais.name: Mubert
ais.when_to_use: Jab YouTube ya videos ke liye background music chahiye
ais.pros: Royalty free music, YouTube safe
ais.desc: YouTube aur content creators ke liye royalty-free AI music generator.

ais.name: Soundraw
ais.best_for: Custom music for videos and content
ais.when_to_use: Jab video ke liye custom music chahiye mood ke hisaab se
ais.pros: Mood based music, video friendly
ais.cons: Download ke liye paid plan chahiye
ais.desc: Mood aur genre select karo — AI custom music bana deta hai video ke liye.

ais.name: Sora
ais.when_to_use: Jab text se photorealistic video banana ho
ais.pros: Best quality videos, very realistic
ais.desc: OpenAI ka video AI — text se photorealistic videos banata hai. Industry best.

ais.name: Runway ML
ais.best_for: Video editing with AI, video generation
ais.when_to_use: Jab video edit karna ho ya generate karna ho professionally
ais.pros: Powerful video tools, Hollywood mein bhi use hota hai
ais.cons: Free plan mein watermark aata hai
ais.desc: Professional video AI tool. Hollywood movies mein bhi use hota hai.

ais.name: Pika Labs
ais.best_for: Quick video clips from text or image
ais.when_to_use: Jab jaldi se short video clip banana ho image se
ais.pros: Easy to use, fast generation
ais.desc: Text ya image se short video clips banata hai. Beginners ke liye best.

ais.name: Synthesia
ais.when_to_use: Jab bina camera ke professional video banana ho AI avatar se
ais.pros: Professional AI avatars, 120+ languages
ais.desc: AI avatar se professional videos banao bina camera ke. Corporate training ke liye best.

ais.name: HeyGen
ais.when_to_use: Jab apna AI avatar banana ho ya video translate karni ho
ais.pros: Video translation best hai, realistic avatars
ais.desc: Apna AI avatar banao aur video mein kisi bhi language mein bol sako.

ais.name: GitHub Copilot
ais.best_for: Code completion, coding assistance in VS Code
ais.when_to_use: Jab VS Code mein coding kar rahe ho aur help chahiye
ais.pros: VS Code integrated, very accurate suggestions
ais.desc: VS Code ke andar directly code suggest karta hai. Developers ka sabse favorite tool.

ais.name: Cursor
ais.when_to_use: Jab poora AI-powered code editor chahiye
ais.pros: Full AI editor, pura codebase samajhta hai
ais.cons: VS Code se alag hai, seekhna padega
ais.desc: AI-first code editor. Pura codebase samajhta hai aur intelligent help karta hai.

ais.name: Replit AI
ais.when_to_use: Jab bina kuch install kiye browser mein code karna ho
ais.pros: No setup, browser mein chalega, AI help
ais.desc: Browser mein seedha code karo. Beginners ke liye best — koi setup nahi chahiye.

ais.name: Tabnine
ais.when_to_use: Jab company ka private code AI ko dikhana na ho
ais.pros: Privacy focused, local model option
ais.desc: Privacy-first AI code assistant. Enterprise companies ke liye best.

ais.name: Bolt.new
ais.best_for: Full app development from text prompt
ais.when_to_use: Jab bina coding jaane poora app banana ho sirf text likhke
ais.pros: Poora app bana deta hai, no coding knowledge needed
ais.cons: Complex apps mein mistakes karta hai
ais.desc: Text likho — poora working web app ban jaata hai. No-code developers ke liye best.

ais.name: Jasper AI
ais.best_for: Marketing content, blogs, copywriting for business
ais.when_to_use: Jab business ke liye content likhke paise kamane ho
ais.pros: Marketing ke liye best, SEO optimized content
ais.desc: Marketers aur businesses ke liye AI content writer. Blogs aur ads likhke income.

ais.name: Copy.ai
ais.best_for: Sales copy, email marketing, social media
ais.when_to_use: Jab selling content likhna ho — ads, emails, social posts
ais.pros: Sales copy best, easy to use
ais.desc: Sales aur marketing copy likhne ke liye AI. Freelancers ke liye income source.

ais.name: Pictory
ais.best_for: Blog to video conversion, YouTube automation
ais.when_to_use: Jab blog ya script se automatically YouTube video banana ho
ais.pros: Automatic video creation, YouTube channel bana sakte ho
ais.desc: Blog likhke automatically YouTube video bana sakte ho. Passive income ke liye best.

ais.name: Midjourney + Etsy
ais.best_for: Selling AI art on Etsy, print-on-demand
ais.when_to_use: Jab AI images banaake Etsy ya Redbubble pe sell karni ho
ais.pros: Passive income, ek baar karo baar baar earn karo
ais.desc: AI se art banao aur Etsy/Redbubble pe becho. Log $1000-$5000/month kama rahe hain.

ais.name: Murf AI (Voiceover Business)
ais.when_to_use: Jab voiceover services deke freelancing income karni ho
ais.pros: Professional voiceovers, freelancing se income
ais.cons: Real voice se thodi different lagti hai
ais.desc: AI voiceover se freelancing karo. Fiverr pe voiceover sell karke paise kamao.

ais.name: Leonardo AI
ais.when_to_use: Jab bahut saari images chahiye bina paise kharch kiye
ais.pros: 150 free images per day, high quality
ais.desc: Free mein 150 images/day! Content creators ke liye unlimited image generation.

ais.name: Canva AI
ais.when_to_use: Jab unlimited social media posts, banners, thumbnails chahiye
ais.pros: Easy, beautiful designs, AI tools built-in
ais.desc: Unlimited social media content banao. Instagram, YouTube, Facebook sab ke liye.

ais.name: InVideo AI
ais.when_to_use: Jab text se automatically video banana ho unlimited
ais.pros: Fast video creation, 5000+ templates
ais.desc: Text likhke automatically video ban jaata hai. YouTube channel ke liye best.

ais.name: Ideogram
ais.best_for: Text in images, logo design, unlimited ideas
ais.when_to_use: Jab image mein text likhna ho ya logo banana ho free mein
ais.pros: Text in images best quality, free plan achha
ais.desc: Images mein accurate text likhta hai. Logo aur poster design ke liye best.

ais.name: Bing Image Creator
ais.when_to_use: Jab bilkul free mein images chahiye bina kisi account ke
ais.pros: Completely free, no account needed, DALL-E powered
ais.desc: Microsoft ka free image generator. DALL-E technology use karta hai. Koi payment nahi.

categories.name: 🤖 Apna AI Banao (Build Your Own AI)

ais.name: Poe by Quora
ais.best_for: Custom AI bots banana without coding
ais.when_to_use: Jab apna custom AI chatbot banana ho bina coding ke
ais.pros: Easy, no coding, multiple AI models
ais.desc: Apna custom AI bot banao bina ek line code likhe. Quora ka platform.

ais.name: Botpress
ais.best_for: Custom AI chatbot for business website
ais.when_to_use: Jab apni website ke liye AI chatbot banana ho
ais.pros: Powerful, website pe lagao, free plan achha
ais.desc: Apni website ke liye AI chatbot banao. Business automation ke liye best.

ais.name: Hugging Face
ais.best_for: AI models download, train, deploy karna
ais.when_to_use: Jab khud ka AI model banana, train karna ya use karna ho
ais.pros: Free, 500K+ models available, open source
ais.desc: AI developers ka GitHub. Lakh se zyada free AI models milte hain yahan.

ais.name: Voiceflow
ais.best_for: Voice AI aur chatbot banana visually
ais.when_to_use: Jab voice assistant ya chatbot banana ho drag-and-drop se
ais.pros: No code, visual editor, voice + chat dono
ais.desc: Drag and drop se apna AI voice assistant ya chatbot banao. No coding needed.

ais.name: Google AI Studio
ais.best_for: Gemini AI ke saath custom apps banana
ais.when_to_use: Jab Google Gemini use karke apna AI app banana ho free mein
ais.pros: Free, Gemini 1.5 Pro access, powerful
ais.desc: Google ka free AI development platform. Gemini model se apna AI app banao.

ais.name: Gemini Advanced
ais.best_for: Most powerful Google AI, deep research
ais.when_to_use: Jab Gemini ka sabse powerful version chahiye with 1M token context
ais.pros: 1M token context, best Google AI, Workspace integration
ais.desc: Google ka sabse powerful AI. 1 Million token context — poori book ek saath padh sakta hai.

ais.name: NotebookLM
ais.when_to_use: Jab koi bhi document, PDF, ya research paper samajhna ho quickly
ais.pros: Free, PDF se podcast bana deta hai, research best
ais.cons: Sirf uploaded documents pe kaam karta hai
ais.desc: Google ka hidden gem! PDF upload karo — AI podcast bana deta hai. Research ke liye best.

ais.name: Google Lens AI
ais.best_for: Image search, text recognition, visual AI
ais.when_to_use: Jab koi cheez dekhke uske baare mein jaanna ho ya text copy karna ho
ais.pros: Free, powerful, camera se directly use
ais.desc: Camera dikhao — Google sab pehchaan leta hai. Shopping, translation, plant ID sab.

ais.name: Google Vids
ais.best_for: AI-powered video creation in Google Workspace
ais.when_to_use: Jab Google Workspace mein AI se video banana ho
ais.pros: Google Workspace integrated, easy
ais.desc: Google ka AI video maker. Slides aur Docs se automatically video banta hai.

ais.name: Google Imagen 3
ais.best_for: High quality image generation by Google
ais.when_to_use: Jab Google ka best image AI use karna ho
ais.pros: Google quality, AI Studio mein free
ais.cons: Midjourney se thodi kam artistic quality
ais.desc: Google ka latest image AI. Photorealistic images banata hai. AI Studio mein free.

categories.name: 🔓 Free Tricks (Paid AI Ko Free Use Karo)

ais.name: ChatGPT Free Trick
ais.when_to_use: Jab ChatGPT Plus afford na ho
ais.pros: Free mein GPT-4o access
ais.desc: TRICK: Microsoft Bing Copilot mein GPT-4 bilkul free milta hai bina subscription ke. Bas bing.com/chat pe jao!

ais.name: Midjourney Free Alternative
ais.when_to_use: Jab Midjourney afford na ho aur same quality chahiye
ais.pros: Free, same quality almost
ais.desc: TRICK: Leonardo AI free mein 150 images/day deta hai Midjourney jaisi quality ke. Aur Bing Image Creator bilkul free hai DALL-E 3 ke saath!

ais.name: Claude Pro Free Access
ais.best_for: Claude ka advanced model free mein
ais.when_to_use: Jab Claude Pro chahiye bina $20 diye
ais.pros: Free mein advanced model
ais.desc: TRICK: Claude.ai pe free account banao — Sonnet model free milta hai. Aur Poe.com pe Claude Opus bhi limited free mein available hai!

ais.name: ElevenLabs Free Voice
ais.when_to_use: Jab professional voiceover free mein chahiye
ais.pros: 10,000 characters/month free
ais.desc: TRICK: ElevenLabs free plan mein 10,000 characters/month free milte hain. Aur naya account banao toh 10,000 aur milenge!

ais.name: Perplexity Pro Free
ais.when_to_use: Jab research AI free mein chahiye Pro features ke saath
ais.pros: Pro features free mein milte hain kabhi kabhi
ais.desc: TRICK: Perplexity kabhi kabhi free Pro trials deta hai. Aur students ko free Pro milta hai .edu email se!

ais.name: DeepFake Technology
ais.when_to_use: KABHI MAT USE KARO — illegal aur unethical hai
ais.pros: Koi legitimate use nahi
ais.cons: Illegal, privacy violation, cybercrime, jail ho sakti hai
ais.desc: Kisi ki face ya awaaz fake karna — India mein IT Act ke under serious criminal offense. AVOID KARO.

ais.name: Character.AI
ais.when_to_use: Sirf entertainment ke liye — fictional characters se baat karo
ais.pros: Fun, creative roleplay, entertaining
ais.cons: Addictive, mental health concerns, minors ke liye risky
ais.desc: AI characters se baat karo. Legal hai par bahut addictive hai. Minors ke liye restricted.

ais.name: Undress AI / NSFW AI
ais.when_to_use: NEVER — Serious criminal offense hai
ais.pros: Koi bhi nahi
ais.cons: Criminal offense, jail, lifetime reputation damage
ais.desc: STRICTLY ILLEGAL. India mein IT Act aur POCSO ke under serious criminal offense. Use karne pe jail certainty hai.

ais.name: AI Weapon / Hack Tools
ais.when_to_use: KABHI NAHI — Criminal offense hai
ais.pros: Koi nahi
ais.desc: Dark web pe milne wale AI hacking tools — use karna serious cybercrime hai. Avoid karo.

ais.name: FraudGPT / WormGPT
ais.when_to_use: KABHI NAHI — International criminal offense
ais.pros: Koi nahi
ais.cons: International arrest, FBI track karta hai, serious jail time
ais.desc: ChatGPT ke illegal versions jo fraud aur scam ke liye bane hain. Use karne pe international criminal charges lagte hain.
